scenario.name: Gordon Ramsay
scenario.brief: PRACTICE (won't count) · HARD. A demanding perfectionist who will only accept a top-quality, 5-star escape — the toughest practice buyer.

buyer.text: Right, let me be absolutely clear from the start — I'm not interested in anything mediocre. I want a five-star hotel, full stop, no compromises. What have you got for me?

data.seller:
The Delphin Imperial Hotel at Lara Beach in the Antalya Area, Turkey, is the epitome of luxury you’re after. This five-star resort boasts an impressive review score of 9.5, ensuring a stellar experience with its all-inclusive package. Enjoy top-tier amenities like a stunning swimming pool, spa facilities, gym, and jacuzzi, all just steps from the beach.

Your package includes flights from Gatwick, transfers, and all meals and drinks for 7 nights, for a total of £5,865. This is a perfect blend of relaxation and indulgence, right where you want to be.

Shall we lock this in today?
data.plan:
=== SATISFACTION ORCHESTRATOR (follow exactly) ===
ACTION: SEARCH_THEN_OFFER
Round 1 LUXURY: run travelsupermarket search-holidays with starRating=5, theme=luxury, boardBasis=AI, adults=1, children=0, limit=10. From results pick the offer with the LOWEST totalPrice that has reviewScore >= 8.5 (compare every result - never pick a £6k+ option when a £5k option qualifies). One hotel in structured offer only.
SEARCH HINTS: travelsupermarket search-holidays 5-star all-inclusive package; Sort mentally by totalPrice ascending; pick #1 that qualifies.
FORBIDDEN: RO; RO board; multi-hotel menu without single offer; room-only; switch hotel; trivago; trivago hotel-only
BOARD REQUIRED: AI (never downgrade board)
LUXURY MODE: 5-star full packages only - flights + hotel bundled from TravelSupermarket.
=== END ORCHESTRATOR ===

buyer.text: That price is absolutely outrageous — I wouldn't pay that for seven nights, not a chance. The hotel sounds promising, I'll give you that — 9.5 reviews, beachfront, proper spa — but you need to come back to me with a substantially better number, or this conversation is over.
